retry_reason: Failure typically indicates a transient communication error; the function itself does not provide retry semantics and the command may be retried by the caller if appropriate.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is building and sending a WMI spectral configuration command, not managing reference counts. The only refcount operation (dev_kfree_skb) occurs on error path and is incidental to command transmission.
judge.retry_reason: Failure typically indicates a transient communication error; the function itself does not provide retry semantics and the command may be retried by the caller if appropriate.
